title: Mergeable if statements should be combined
description: Mergeable "if" statements should be combinedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellclumsyWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?Nested code - blocks of code inside blocks of code - is eventually necessary, but increases complexity. This is why keeping the code as flat as possible, by avoiding unnecessary nesting, is considered a good practice.Mergingifstatements when possible will decrease the nesting of the code and improve its readability.Code likeif (condition1) { if (condition2) { // Noncompliant /* ... */ } }will be more readable asif (condition1 && condition2) { // Compliant /* ..
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Mergeable if statements should be combined. Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.
